compiled_state.title: Strengthen brainstorm and preplanning: full scrutiny for split epics, feasibility-gap resolution, and LLM prompt alignment
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Context

DSO plugin practitioners running /dso:brainstorm and /dso:preplanning encounter three gaps that allow underspecified work to reach implementation. First, when brainstorm splits an epic or creates follow-on epics, the derivatives bypass the scrutiny pipeline (fidelity review, feasibility check, scenario analysis) — they get a lightweight approval gate but no rigorous validation, meaning underspecified epics can enter preplanning. Second, when the feasibility reviewer or integration research surfaces unverified capabilities, the system recommends advisory spike tasks that are never enforced — agents discover capability gaps mid-implementation instead of mid-planning. Third, epics that create or modify LLM prompt logic (skills, sub-agents, prompts) are treated as ordinary internal tooling despite being especially sensitive to user intent due to non-deterministic execution — no prior-art search for similar prompts and no proactive behavioral review occur during design.

## Success Criteria

- When brainstorm creates follow-on or split epics, each passes through the full scrutiny pipeline before ticket creation — with a follow-on depth parameter (max 1) passed to the scrutiny pipeline to prevent recursive loops; follow-on epics of follow-on epics are presented as ticket stubs for user approval without re-entering scrutiny
- When feasibility gaps are unresolved, brainstorm returns to the Phase 1 understanding loop for additional research and user alignment — bounded by brainstorm.max_feasibility_cycles (default 2) with user escalation after exhaustion
- When preplanning surfaces unresolved feasibility gaps during Integration Research, it emits REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm to route back through the understanding loop
- When an epic involves LLM prompt logic, the scrutiny pipeline triggers a prompt-alignment step: provider-agnostic prior-art search on GitHub for similar prompts in popular AI/LLM projects, collaborative drafting of prompt text with the user, and dispatch of dso:bot-psychologist via Agent tool to review the draft — with findings incorporated into the epic spec before approval
- The bot-psychologist dispatch is conditional, triggered by a canonical LLM-instruction signal keyword list defined in the scrutiny pipeline (skill file modifications, agent definitions, prompt templates, hook behavioral logic) with exclusion for documentation-only epics whose Approach section references only doc files
- The brainstorm planning-intelligence log records when each new mechanism engages: whether follow-on scrutiny ran (and depth), whether the feasibility-resolution loop cycled (count and triggering gap), and whether the LLM-instruction signal fired (matched keyword) — providing a traceable audit trail for retrospective analysis

## Scenario Analysis

- Infinite follow-on scrutiny loop (critical): mitigated by depth cap of 1 — follow-on epics of follow-on epics become ticket stubs
- Unescapable feasibility research loop (critical): mitigated by brainstorm.max_feasibility_cycles (default 2) with user escalation
- LLM-instruction signal false negatives (high): mitigated by canonical keyword list with fuzzy-match and explicit signal categories
- Follow-on gap analysis uses wrong reference (high): mitigated by request_origin parameter (user vs scope-split) to suppress Part A artifact gaps
- Doc epics falsely trigger bot-psychologist (low): mitigated by approach-content check

## Research Findings

Proactive prompt review: youcommit/promptlint (policy-as-code, SARIF), arxiv 2509.14404 (6-dimension defect taxonomy), levnikolaevich/claude-code-skills (multi-model cross-validation). Bot-psychologist 15-point taxonomy + KERNEL framework is the right tool for proactive review during brainstorm.

## Dependencies

None

## Approach

Extend epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md with three capabilities: (1) prompt-alignment step with LLM-instruction signal detection, prior-art search, and bot-psychologist conditional review via Agent tool; (2) feasibility-resolution gate replacing spike recommendations with return to understanding loop; (3) multi-epic scrutiny in Follow-on Epic Gate with depth cap. Preplanning emits REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm on unresolved gaps.

### Planning Intelligence Log

- Web research (Step 2.6): triggered — novel architectural pattern (proactive prompt review)
- Scenario analysis (Step 2.75): triggered — 5 scenarios surviving blue team filter
- Practitioner-requested additional cycles: none

comments.body: Adversarial review: 6 findings, 3 accepted (dual spike sites, config key functional, log integration contracts). 3 rejected (bot-psych guard not applicable to Agent tool, Part A suppression already scoped, keyword overlap is composable not conflicting).
